title: Esan Marsters
description: Cook Islands & NZ international rugby league footballer
extract:
Esan Marsters (born 17 August 1996) is a professional rugby league footballer who plays as a centre or stand-off for the Bradford Bulls in the Super League. He has played for the Cook Islands, New Zealand and the New Zealand Māori at international level.
He previously played for the Wests Tigers, North Queensland Cowboys and the Gold Coast Titans in the National Rugby League.
